overview: HealthMatrix360 is a comprehensive hospital management system supporting multiple hospitals with role-based access for Super Admin, Hospital Admin, Doctor, Receptionist, and Patient. Features include light/dark theme toggle, multi-hospital data scoping, Super Admin dashboard for cross-hospital oversight, patient management, appointments, prescriptions, and billing.
features: Light/dark theme toggle with persisted preference
Super Admin role with cross-hospital oversight dashboard
Multi-hospital architecture with data scoping by hospital
User oversight and management across all hospitals
Hospital profile settings (name, logo, address, contact)
Role-based dashboards: Admin, Doctor, Receptionist, Patient
Patient registration, appointment booking, prescriptions, billing
